question.label: Communication feedback
question.name: Communication feedback — what part of it are you still working through?
question.description: Drills into the feedback she named so you can locate the specific friction before moving on.

answer: I want more room to lead cross-functional discussions earlier.

assessment.note: She wants earlier room to lead cross-functional discussions, which signals mild growth pull and some ongoing friction around how the feedback is landing.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Visible ownership
new_queue.name: Where do you want more visible ownership on the frontend work?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what would make the next two weeks steadier for you?

issues: coverage: injected growth into next question (0 touches after turn 6)

history.answer_excerpt: I can ship quickly, but I do not always feel the impact is visible.
Feedback on communication landed, and I am still processing it.
I want more room to lead cross-functional discussions earlier.
The push worked, but I do not want that pace to become normal.
I am less overloaded now, but my calendar is still fragmented.
